# Global Finance Report Q4

John Blackwell is the CEO of Goldman Partners in New York.
Goldman Partners manages over 500 billion USD in assets.
The Federal Reserve raised interest rates by 0.25 percent in December.

Maria Fernandez joined Morgan Stanley as head of risk management.
Morgan Stanley uses Salesforce for customer relationship management.
The S&P 500 index dropped 2.3 percent after the announcement.

Alice Cooper is a famous rock musician, not related to software engineering.
Bob Dylan won the Nobel Prize in Literature in 2016.
